title: Inbound Announce (boost) + Undo Announce
description: Handle inbound Announce activities (boosts) of local posts and remote posts. If the Announce.object is a URI to an unfetched post, fetch and cache it first. Create a reblogs_count increment and a reblog notification for local post authors. Handle Undo{Announce} symmetrically.
design: Announce.object may be a URI — fetch synchronously before proceeding. Cache fetched post in remote_posts. Track boosts in a separate boosts table or via remote_posts with a boost_of reference. Undo matches by the boosting actor URI and the boosted post URI.
acceptance_criteria: Remote actor boosts local post; post author gets reblog notification; reblogs_count increments; Announce of remote post fetches and caches the post; Undo Announce removes the boost; Announce.object as URI (not object) is handled correctly
